title: gastrochilus pumilio
intro: Gastrochilus pumilio, also known as the dwarf orchid, is a type of orchid native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gastrochilus pumilio include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Traditional herbal preparations involve using the plant's leaves and roots to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
